_templateName: Monitor Elderly Health Vitals & Send Alerts with Apple Health, Twilio & Gmail
name: Elderwatch

parameters.content:
## Webhook called from phone.  
Processor determines if health scores need immediate attention.
## Twilio HTTP Calls API to make a call and also email.

=

📋 Elder Watch – Daily Health Summary

Hello,

This report was automatically generated by the Elder Watch system.
Built with love and n8n by a human who has probably not blinked since the first webhook failed.
